---
title: "Contact"
---

## Questions?

For questions about the Dayton Data Challenge, please contact:

**Dr. Ying-Ju Tessa Chen**  
Department of Mathematics  
University of Dayton  
Office: SC 329 C  
Email: [ychen4@udayton.edu](mailto:ychen4@udayton.edu)

We are happy to discuss ideas, participation, or team formation.
